signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: The Canadian consumer has been a little bit more sensitive to markdowns...we did have a higher markdown penetration than we would have liked...130 basis point increase in markdowns in Q4.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: Our plan calls for approximately 40 to 45 net new openings...we are taking a disciplined approach to capital spending and looking at our real estate project on a case-by-case basis.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We are lowering that penetration [markdowns]...we're expecting a modest improvement in markdowns for the full year, predominantly driven through the second half, and we are expecting just a modest increase in Q1.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We recognize there is more work to be done, and we have been course-correcting on a number of fronts...we lost about less than 1 point in activewear [market share].
